modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Ticket software shows print job sent, but printer remains inactive.

full_description_text: The user was trying to print tickets. The software indicated the print job was successful. However, the ticket printer did not receive any print jobs. This issue occurred on a Windows 10 system with a specific printer model.
short_description: Ticket software shows print job sent, but printer remains inactive.
description: The user was trying to print tickets. The software indicated the print job was successful. However, the ticket printer did not receive any print jobs. This issue occurred on a Windows 10 system with a specific printer model.
